lines: Mbes’uriy’ubabaye,  Wambay’ibitabutse Birihw amaraso ye, Mutubwir’uw' ari we. Dor’ukunt'ananiwe N’igiti yikoreye ! Ko yaboshywe nabi se, Ninde kand’aziz’iki ?
Uwo munt' ubay’atyo Niwe Nyir'ubugingo. Ibicumuro byawe Ni byo bamujijije.
We kujarajar’utyo:Sang’Uwagupfiriye; Pfukam’i Gologota, Wihan' ubabarirwe.
Dor’amahw' asongoye Ni yo kamba yam bitswe, Kand’intebe y'ubwami Yabay’
Umusaraba.Mbes’Umwam' ugizw’atyo, Namumenyeshwa n’iki ? Soma ’icyo kirego, ngo Yesu w'i Nazareti.
Umva Yes’avug' ati: Nshuti yanjy’umenye ko Icyankuye mw ijuru
ar’ukukubeshaho.Ni wowe mbabarizwa, Bakanshinyagurira. Emera nkurokore,
yawe.Non’ inzir’undangira Niyo nzajya nyuramo, Nger’i Wawe mw ijuru, Nzahore
